title: Metrics and analytics
excerpt: description: Query R2 Data Catalog metrics for Iceberg REST API operations and table maintenance jobs via the GraphQL Analytics API. image: https://developers.cloudflare.com/dev-products-preview.png > Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://developers.cloudflare.com/r2/llms.txt > Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further. R2 Data Catalog exposes metrics that allow you to monitor Iceberg REST API requests and table maintenance jobs (compaction and snapshot expiration) across your warehouses. The metrics displayed in the Cloudflare dashboard are queried from Cloudflare's [GraphQL Analytics API](https://developers.cloudflare.com/analytics/graphql-api/).…
